---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-27"
---

Load libraries.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(ggpubr)
```

Read in data.

```{r}
dryweight <- read_excel("Male cohort 3 - PO/Data to plot - cohort 3.xlsx", sheet = "Dry_weight_3")
dryweight$`Mouse group` <- ifelse(dryweight$`Mouse group` == 'Veh (PO)', 'Veh\n(PO)', 'G_50\n(PO)')
dryweight$`Mouse group` <- factor(dryweight$`Mouse group`,
                                levels = c('Veh\n(PO)',
                                           'G_50\n(PO)'))

dryweight <- dplyr::rename(dryweight, pc_dry_weight=`% dry weight`)
```

Plot.

```{r}
ggplot(dryweight, aes(x = `Mouse group`, y = pc_dry_weight)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = `Mouse group`), fill = NA, outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "grey", position = position_jitter(width = 0.1), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Veh\n(PO)" = "#008888", "G_50\n(PO)" = "#000080")) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "t.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    comparisons = list(c("Veh\n(PO)", "G_50\n(PO)")),
    hide.ns = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(y = "% dry weight") + ylim(0,100)

ggsave("Male cohort 3 - PO/dry_weight.pdf", width = 2, height = 2)
```

Stats.

```{r}
print(t.test(
  dplyr::filter(dryweight, `Mouse group` == 'Veh\n(PO)')$pc_dry_weight,
  dplyr::filter(dryweight, `Mouse group` == 'G_50\n(PO)')$pc_dry_weight
))
```
